_comment: Pack-level color defaults — keys match ChanceKind keys (plain, enchanted, description_plain, description_enchanted, mob_passive, mob_villager); values are lowercase ChatFormatting color names (e.g. dark_gray, gold). Unknown keys, non-string values, and non-color formats (bold, italic, reset) are logged and skipped. Underscore-prefixed keys like this comment are silently ignored.
